Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril hosts culinary students from his alma mater, Johnson & Wales University.
Video.title: Gumbo 101

Video.summary: Emeril and food critic Ian McNulty make classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Ian McNulty

Video.summary: Emeril takes you on a trip to Spain as he shares his favorite meals.
Video.title: Taste of Spain

Video.summary: Emeril prepares coffee-infused recipes.
Video.title: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Image.alt: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes
Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes
Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Video.summary: New York City firefighters turn up the heat in Emeril's kitchen.
Video.title: Turn Up the Heat

Video.summary: Emeril shows you how versatile phyllo dough is as he makes both sweet and savory dishes.
Video.title: The Magic of Phyllo

Video.summary: Any time of year is a great time for a cookout! Join Emeril for grilled rack of lamb with mixed-herb pesto and a side of grilled potatoes with feta
Video.title: Grill It Up!

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Gabrielle Deculus celebrate creole culinary culture.
Video.title: with Gabrielle Deculus

Video.summary: It's a pizza party! Emeril will how you how to make basic dough. Plus, Emeril shares his recipes for the ultimate mushroom and Manchego pizza and classic pizza margherita
Video.title: Making Pizza at Home

Video.summary: Emeril shows a group of bachelors how to impress with a classic and affordable French dinner: sauteed chicken cutlets with Dijon-tarragon sauce, braised carrots, and pommes Lyonnaise
Video.title: Frugal French

Video.summary: A trip to a farmer's market inspired Emeril to present creamy turnip and parsnip soup. Plus, roasted chicken breasts with roasted acorn squash, braised pears, and pear cider reduction
Video.title: Cooking Local, Cooking Fresh

Video.summary: For your next get together, host a dinner the New Orleans way!
Video.title: Crawfish Celebration

Video.summary: Emeril spotlights Louisiana hot sauce and turns up the heat on Piri Piri Shrimp and Wings with Pimenta Moida Sauce.
Video.title: No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce

Image.alt: No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce
No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce
No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Creole cream cheese, which was almost lost to time until one family farm helped save it.
Video.title: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Image.alt: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Video.summary: For your next get together, make Louisiana bourbon the star ingredient.
Video.title: Louisiana Bourbon

Video.summary: For your next get together, try Emeril's favorite beef recipes with an international twist!
Video.title: Why Grass-Fed Beef?

Video.summary: For your next get together, make okra the main event.
Video.title: Best Okra in Town

Video.summary: Emeril prepares satisfying soups: Cuban black bean soup, tortilla soup, and French onion soup topped with bubbling Gruyere cheese
Video.title: International Soups

Video.summary: Smoked Trout Hash with Fried Eggs, Smoked Salmon Cakes on a Bed of Grilled Vegetables over Lemon Dill Sauce
Video.title: Cooking with Smoked Fish

Video.summary: For your next get together, try grilling squab instead of chicken.
Video.title: Bringing Back Squab

Video.summary: Embrace autumn with Emeril's sweet and savory apple recipes.
Video.title: Amazing Apples

Video.summary: Scrambled Ham and Egg Breakfast Sandwiches on Biscuits; Kicked-Up Shrimp Caesar Salad Piadine; Turkey Sandwiches with Pesto Mayonnaise and Dried Cranberries
Video.title: Super-Duper Sandwiches

Video.summary: Crab Meat Asparagus Salad, Roasted Chicken with Lemon Herb Sauce, Vanilla Creme Brulee
Video.title: The Art of Plating

Video.summary: Emeril prepares "kicked-up" sandwiches with the Radio City Rockettes: spicy eggplant with mozzarella and basil, porchetta with dandelion greens, and Elvis Presley-inspired peanut butter and banana
Video.title: Kicked-Up Sandwiches

Video.summary: Emeril prepares healthy kids' meals: baked chicken fingers with creamy dreamy dipping sauce, edamame with sesame oil, and hot and hearty minestrone soup. Both kids and parents will love these dishes!
Video.title: Healthy Kids' Meals

Video.summary: Make delicious Asian dishes with Emeril's recipes: chicken and veggie stir-fry with cellophane noodles, beef and soba noodle stir-fry, and cold-noodle salad with honey-sesame dressing and peanuts
Video.title: Asian Noodles

Video.summary: With the help of Fleisher's Grass-Fed and Organic Meats butchers, Emeril prepares seared tri-tip steak with bearnaise sauce and grilled flat-iron steak with avocado, tomato, and red onion salad
Video.title: Butchers' Favorite Cuts

Video.summary: Emeril will how you how to create authentic Mexican flavors: chicken and green chile tamales with roasted tomato salsa and tres leches cake
Video.title: Tamales

Video.summary: For your next get together, bring a touch of New Orleans with some andouille sausage.
Video.title: Andouille Sausage 101

Video.summary: Emeril and Maggie Long and Cyrus Lester share a meal incorporating fresh mushrooms from their farm.
Video.title: with Mushroom Maggie's

Video.summary: Vodka and Citrus Cured Salmon, Mini Open-Faced Corn Cake and Salmon Salad Sandwiches, Funky Southwestern Turkey, Rhubarb and Apple Pie with Walnut Crumb Topping
Video.title: Prime Time Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril's ultimate indulgences: Shrimp Cakes with Roasted Shrimp Sauce; Lamb Shanks with Sweet Corn-Tomato Risotto; Baked Alaska with Frangelico Sauce
Video.title: Ultimate Indulgence

Video.summary: Split Pea Soup with Roasted Fennel and Lobster Salad, Tuscan Bean Soup, Crispy Catfish and Black-Eyed Pea, Bacon and Caramelized Onion Relish with Fried Collard Greens
Video.title: B is for Beans

Video.summary: Fresh Fruit Snowballs; Green Onion Sausage with Cherry-Mustard Dipping Sauce; Summer Risotto with Herbed Trout Fillets; Cornmeal-Olive Oil Cake with Poached Peaches
Video.title: Farmer's Market

Video.summary: Strawberry Lemon Crush, Salad with Blackberry Vinaigrette, Pork Loin with Raspberry Chipotle Glaze, Wild Rice and Cranberry Dressing, Blueberry Bread Pudding
Video.title: Bustin' with Berries

Video.summary: Stewed Black Eyed Peas and Ham Hocks, Cracklin' Cornbread Muffins, Pan-Fried Catfish with Andouille, Potato Salad
Video.title: Southern Favorites

Video.summary: Turkey Meatballs with Minted Yogurt Dipping Sauce; Deep-Dish Pizzas with Mascarpone, Crispy Ham, and Pesto; Mozzarella-Tomato Bites
Video.title: Quick and Easy Hors d'oeuvres for a Party

Image.alt: Quick and Easy Hors d'oeuvres for a Party
Quick and Easy Hors d'oeuvres for a Party
Quick and Easy Hors d'oeuvres for a Party
